message:
fix(control_plane): distinguish not-all-acked from timeout in epoch transition barrier

The barrier conflated "drain ACKs still outstanding" with "barrier timed
out" under ERR_BARRIER_TIMEOUT. Add BarrierError::NotAllAcked with the
list of missing participants so callers can distinguish a barrier that is
still collecting ACKs from one that has genuinely timed out.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
